title: PGIMER Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 02 Pharmacist Posts
description: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research (PGIMER) has released an official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for 02 Pharmacist Positions. Those candidates who have qualified in the B.Pharm and M.Pharm can grab this opportunity and apply for the PGIMER Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Governmen...
